title: Infapower Large Rechargeable Lantern F059 24 LED with USB Charging Cable - Copper
features: Automatically turns on when power is cut
description: Infapower Large Rechargeable Lantern is ideal for emergency use. Automatically turns on in the event of a power outage. 24 super bright LEDs for lantern use. LED Lifespan: 100,000 hours International use, can be charged with a simple USB charger. Comes with USB charging cable. Built-in maintenance-free sealed lead acid battery 4V 5.5Ah It has a built in sturdy carry handle and can also be wall mounted. Features: 24 Super Bright LEDs, 520 Lumens Automatically turns on in the event of a power outage. Includes USB charging cable. Working time: 5 hours (100% brightness). Working time: 12 hours (50% brightness). Full charge 24 hours flat. Worldwide use. Sturdy construction Red indicator for charging. LED Lifespan: 100,000 hours Sturdy carry handle and wall mount
